history.qwen_observation: Step upgrade_spring_boot_2_7 updated dependencies to Spring Data REST 3.7 and HATEOAS 1.5, which removed RepositoryRestConfigurerAdapter and Resources/Resource classes, causing compilation failure due to missing source migration recipes.
history.qwen_rationale: Skipping the intermediate SB 2.7 step avoids the immediate compile failure from unsupported API removals. Jumping directly to UpgradeSpringBoot_3_3 under JDK 17 leverages the meta-recipe's broader source transformations and aligns the project with the required Java 17+ baseline for SB 3.x, bypassing the 2.7-specific breaking changes that lack corresponding OpenRewrite primitives.

history.qwen_observation: Dependency resolution failed for org.hibernate.orm:hibernate-core:5.3.1.Final because the Spring Boot 3.3 upgrade recipe changed the Hibernate group ID to the v6 namespace but left the version at 5.3.1.Final, which does not exist under that group.
history.qwen_rationale: Insert org.openrewrite.hibernate.MigrateToHibernate62 before the Spring Boot 3.3 upgrade to correctly migrate the Hibernate dependency to version 6.2 (which uses the org.hibernate.orm group ID). Also restore the missing upgrade_build_to_java17 step to ensure the Maven compiler plugin and source/target levels are properly configured for Java 17 before the framework upgrade runs.

history.qwen_observation: The MigrateToHibernate62 recipe updated dependencies to Jakarta EE but did not migrate source code imports from javax.persistence to jakarta.persistence, causing type mismatch compilation errors.
history.qwen_rationale: Adding JavaxMigrationToJakarta to the hibernate_to_62 step will update the source imports to match the new Jakarta dependencies before the Spring Boot 3.3 upgrade runs, resolving the incompatible types error.

history.qwen_observation: Compilation failed because JavaxMigrationToJakarta changed imports to jakarta.* but the project was still on Spring Boot 2.x, which provides javax.* dependencies, causing jakarta.annotation package not found.
history.qwen_rationale: Running JavaxMigrationToJakarta before upgrading Spring Boot to 3.x breaks compilation because SB 2.x does not include Jakarta EE dependencies. The UpgradeSpringBoot_3_3 meta-recipe handles the javax-to-jakarta migration, dependency updates, and Java 17 build configuration internally. Replacing the manual Hibernate/Jakarta step and the Java 17 build step with UpgradeSpringBoot_3_3 aligns with the recommended migration path for SB 2.x projects.

history.qwen_observation: UpgradeSpringBoot_3_3 failed because it changed Hibernate's group ID to org.hibernate.orm but retained version 5.3.1.Final, which does not exist under that group ID.
history.qwen_rationale: Stepping through Spring Boot 2.7 first allows Hibernate to be upgraded to 5.6.x under the correct org.hibernate group ID. Then UpgradeSpringBoot_3_3 can safely migrate to Hibernate 6.x with the correct org.hibernate.orm group ID, avoiding the dependency resolution failure.
